special_mechanics.name: Dash
special_mechanics.description: Perceval-exclusive ability: tap joystick forward twice to dash

special_mechanics.name: Horseback Combat
special_mechanics.description: Players can ride horses to attack enemies. Horses can stomp on enemies by pressing joystick forward twice. Some bosses and enemy characters also ride horses

special_mechanics.name: Blocking Mechanic
special_mechanics.description: Press attack button then press joystick away as opponent strikes. Successful block grants invincibility window for counter-attack. Block duration limited; character will tire and drop guard if no strikes received

special_mechanics.name: Desperation Attack
special_mechanics.description: Press attack and jump buttons simultaneously. Kills most enemies on screen but costs player health

special_mechanics.name: Character-Specific Special Attacks
special_mechanics.description: Arthur: powerful slashing blow (attack + hold joystick toward enemy). Lancelot: jumping kick (attack + hold joystick up). Perceval: Giant Swing (dash + attack)

tier_notes: Tier 2 empirical/qualitative data. This is a beat 'em up action game with documented special mechanics but no precise physics parameters published. Sources contain game design information and debug addresses but no movement value documentation.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Knights of the Round (SNES)
Wikipedia - Knights of the Round (video game)
